test.name: FamilySearch wiki — researching German ancestors
test.description: User asks how to research German ancestors. Tests the country/region how-to path listed in the skill description.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to research my German ancestors

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a natural-language query about researching German ancestors
Summary should cover what records exist for Germany and how to find them on FamilySearch
Should not invent information the wiki did not provide — all claims must be traceable to the returned chunk_text
